title: Estrogen Together
description: A silly create modpack to play with frens :3
body:
# Main parts of the modpack
Create and a lot of it's addons
including create estrogen, crafts and additions, stuff 'n additions, steam and rails, and more

## worldgen
the main worldgen mods are terralith and tectonic

### :3
mainly just a silly little modpack i made to play with friends :3
